title: Inside The Old Skydiving Plane Hunting Drones in Ukraine
summary_full: As Russian drones overwhelm Ukraine’s vast air defenses, civilian volunteers are stepping in to take them down. The New York Times takes flight with a crew that’s turned an old skydiving plane into a drone hunter.
summary_public: As Russian drones overwhelm Ukraine’s vast air defenses, civilian volunteers are stepping in to take them down. The New York Times takes flight with a crew that’s turned an old skydiving plane into a drone hunter.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russian drones overwhelm Ukraine’s vast air defenses

UA.label: mixed
UA.evidence: Russian drones overwhelm Ukraine’s vast air defenses, civilian volunteers are stepping in
